name: Rapid Line Inc.
business: Rapid Line Inc. is a development stage company that has developed a mobile application and website platform designed to connect service providers with consumers. As of January 31, 2026, the company has not generated any revenues from its operations. The primary asset is the proprietary KIDWIN mobile application, which has been temporarily removed from app stores while management re-evaluates its features and strategy.

exposures.sentence: Our primary asset is the proprietary KIDWIN mobile application.
